meta_title: For Students: debugging with AI to Solve can't monetize skills (Advanced Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't monetize skills. A Advanced-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Master Monetization for Students
content.seo_description: Bridge the gap between coding skills and monetization. Master advanced debugging workflows using Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional-grade apps.
content.answer_block: Monetization fails when your code is fragile and unshipable. By integrating AI-driven debugging into your workflow, you transform from a struggling student into a reliable engineer. Use Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for rapid resolution, ensuring your projects are robust, scalable, and ready for the production market.
content.intro:
You’ve spent hundreds of hours in VS Code, yet the barrier between 'tutorial completion' and 'paying user' feels like a chasm. The frustration isn't your lack of logic; it's the inability to ship production-ready code that survives real-world edge cases. You are building in a vacuum, where one obscure runtime error kills your momentum and your confidence.

But the game has changed. By treating AI as a senior engineering partner rather than a search engine, you can bypass the 'student trap.' This guide reveals how to leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to harden your codebase, squash architectural bottlenecks, and finally build software that generates value.

steps.title: Architectural Audit
steps.description: Before writing a single line of code, use AI to identify structural weaknesses that prevent scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a critical architectural audit of this repository. Identify three specific bottlenecks that would prevent this from scaling to 10k users and suggest refactoring strategies for modularity.

steps.title: Automated Error Trace Analysis
steps.description: Stop guessing why your code fails. Inject deep observability to pinpoint the exact source of runtime failures.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this stack trace and the corresponding file context. Explain the root cause in terms of memory management and propose a fix that prevents this class of error entirely.
steps.claude_code_command: claude fix --file ./src/app.ts --error 'Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read property'

steps.title: Edge Case Hardening
steps.description: Monetizable apps don't crash on bad inputs. Use AI to generate adversarial test cases.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate five adversarial unit tests for this function that cover edge cases, null inputs, and unexpected data types. Ensure the function handles these gracefully.

steps.title: Performance Optimization
steps.description: Latency kills conversion. Optimize your hot paths to ensure a lightning-fast user experience.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this hot path for O(1) or O(log n) complexity. Identify unnecessary re-renders or database overhead and provide the optimized implementation.

steps.title: Production Readiness Check
steps.description: Final verification to ensure your code meets industry standards before deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review this module for security vulnerabilities and production readiness. Ensure all error handling is user-facing and informative without leaking system details.

pro_tips: Always provide the AI with your 'system constraints' before asking for a fix; it prevents the AI from suggesting libraries you aren't using.
Use Claude Code in 'diff' mode to review changes line-by-line; never blindly accept AI suggestions without understanding the underlying logic.
Maintain a 'context.md' file in your root directory; updating this ensures the AI understands your project's specific state and goals.
When debugging, ask the AI to explain the 'why' behind the bug, not just the fix; this is how you actually level up your engineering intuition.
Create a custom 'debugging prompt library' in Antigravity to standardize how you handle common issues like authentication failures or API timeouts.
content.next_steps: Deploy your project to a staging environment and run a load test using the debugging patterns established here.
content.conversion_block: Stop building projects that sit in your GitHub graveyard. Start shipping software that users are excited to pay for by mastering the tools that lead the industry. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
